metadata.title: Vysion Horeca | All-in-One POS & Payment Platform
metadata.description: The complete POS system for hospitality. Cash register, online orders, invoicing, staff management and more - all in one platform. Try 14 days free.

subscriptionsPage.title: Subscriptions
subscriptionsPage.subtitle: One platform for your business — transparent and cancel monthly.
subscriptionsPage.lead: Choose Pro or Premium and pay monthly or yearly. Updates and support are included.
subscriptionsPage.bullet1: No long-term lock-in; cancel anytime on a monthly plan.
subscriptionsPage.bullet2: 14-day free trial, no credit card required.
subscriptionsPage.bullet3: POS, reservations, online ordering and more in one place.
subscriptionsPage.bullet4: You choose which modules you need and which you don't.
subscriptionsPage.contactLine: Questions? Use the contact section on the homepage.
subscriptionsPage.vysionProRightP1: Vysion Pro brings online ordering, your own website, stock, kitchen display, table reservations and more together in one subscription.
subscriptionsPage.vysionProRightP2: Choose monthly or yearly billing; yearly plans save 10%. Every feature on the card is included, with free onboarding training and support.
subscriptionsPage.vysionProModulesP1: You choose which modules you want in your hardware—you don't pay for what you don't use.
subscriptionsPage.vysionProModulesP2: Want your own module the way it worked with your previous till? No problem: our programmers build it for you in-house.
subscriptionsPage.vysionProLifestyleAlt: Hospitality: shared pan with Asian dishes, glazed meat and prawns on a set restaurant table.
subscriptionsPage.premiumShowcaseTitle: Vysion Premium — our software & hardware in your venue
subscriptionsPage.premiumCardShowcaseAlt: Overview of the Vysion Premium plan with features and pricing
subscriptionsPage.galleryHardwareAlt1: Black touchscreen POS with receipt printer on the counter
subscriptionsPage.galleryHardwareAlt2: White touchscreen POS in a hospitality interior
subscriptionsPage.galleryHardwareAlt3: Digital menu display on a marble counter
subscriptionsPage.premiumPitchLead: Full POS system with hardware, software & unlimited support for just €99/month
subscriptionsPage.premiumPitchP1: You get a robust, professional system that stays fast with the latest updates—not an iPad-based till that breaks after a year.
subscriptionsPage.premiumPitchP2: We take care of everything for you: we deliver your till or ordering platform and provide free training, with no installation hassle. Afterwards you get direct numbers for our developers—no phone robots.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingTitle: Switching to Vysion is surprisingly simple
subscriptionsPage.onboardingP1: Many hospitality businesses put off moving to a new POS, but it doesn't have to be difficult. At Vysion we do the heavy lifting. You share your menu; we build everything in exactly the way you work.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingP2: Nothing to install, nothing to figure out alone, and no vague roadmaps or call-centre runaround.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingP3Bold: Within a week you'll have a fully working system
subscriptionsPage.onboardingP3After: , plug and play, tailored to your venue. At handover we take the time to explain things so you know exactly how everything works. It really can be that simple.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingImageAlt: Vysion POS touchscreen with receipt printer in an elegant restaurant setting
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep1Desc: Via the form or by phone. We listen to your venue and what you need.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep2Desc: You share your menu or price list; we enter everything correctly in the system.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep3Title: 3: We set up your till for you
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep3Desc: We configure the software the way your business runs, ready to use from day one.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep4Desc: Your POS is plug and play, including all hardware.
subscriptionsPage.onboardingStep5Desc: We deliver your hardware to you and you get free training from us.

fullPlatform.title: Full platform for every sector
fullPlatform.body: POS, online ordering, kitchen display, reservations, website and reporting in one place. No scattered tools or double work. Everything works together for your venue. You choose which modules you need. Save at least €1,500 per year compared to using separate platforms such as Lightspeed, It’s Ready, One2three, Zenchef and Deliveroo. Vysion works with every sector—from hospitality to hair salons, from clothing retail to bakeries.

liveSupport.title: Live support
liveSupport.body: Our team is there when you need us: onboarding, day-to-day questions and busy shifts. Fast answers so you can keep service running.

rightPrice.title: The right price
rightPrice.body: No more paying commissions or extra installation fees on the side. That’s included in your subscription. Clear plans with no hidden fees; you pay for what you need and scale as your business grows.

inHouseSoftware.title: Built in-house
inHouseSoftware.body: Our software is developed in-house by our own engineers.

posQuality.title: High-quality premium hardware
posQuality.body: Our hardware and software are built to a very high standard. Save on installation and staffing costs. Often well over 30% per month. Our hardware includes a dual-screen setup, Intel Core i5 processor, 128 GB SSD storage and 8 GB RAM.

foodtrucksOffline.title: Food trucks & offline
foodtrucksOffline.body: Our platform is built for food trucks too and works flawlessly offline. When you’re back home in the evening on Wi‑Fi, your full platform updates itself.

gratisWebsiteBanner.title: Free website
gratisWebsiteBanner.body: With your subscription you receive a completely free website of your own — included at no extra cost. You can fully customize your site to your taste: colors, photos, everything.

vysionBeest.headline: The Vysion "beast": maximum power, full ownership
vysionBeest.intro: Choose hardware that not only speeds up your business, but after 24 months is truly **your property**. No endless renting — an investment in your company’s future.
vysionBeest.specSpeed: **Blazing speed**: thanks to the **Intel Core i5 processor** and **8 GB RAM**, you process transactions instantly, without stutter — whether you have 10 or 10,000 products.
vysionBeest.specDualMain: **15-inch main display**: for you and your staff. Bright, responsive and built for intensive daily use.
vysionBeest.specDualCustomer: **11.5-inch customer display**: for your customers. Show the order, promotions, or let them pay via QR code.
vysionBeest.specStorage: **Reliable storage**: the **128 GB SSD** means your till boots in seconds and your data stays safe and lightning-fast to access.
vysionBeest.worksHeading: Why this system works for everyone
vysionBeest.worksLead: This is not a simple tablet on a stand, but a professional, industrial workstation. Whether you run a bakery, clothing store, café or online shop: the hardware keeps up with your pace.
vysionBeest.worksBullet1: **Fair deal**: no hidden costs. After 24 months payments stop and the machine is 100% yours.
vysionBeest.worksBullet2: **Sector-friendly**: the clean design looks professional on every counter.
vysionBeest.quote: Stop renting, start owning. Choose the power of an i5 workstation.

kassasysteem.title: POS system
kassasysteem.teaser: Fast checkout linked to online orders and reporting.
kassasysteem.body:
Your till is the heart of the business: quick sales, accurate receipts and a real-time link to your ordering stack and kitchen.

With Vysion Horeca you run products, tables, payments and staff from one place — fewer mistakes at peak and clear day-end closing.

kassasysteem.horecaLeadAfter: Works with most Windows-based POS PCs on a recent version. Also runs smoothly on iPad®, Android® and kiosks.
kassasysteem.horecaCloudBold: Run your venue effortlessly from the cloud
kassasysteem.horecaCloudAfter: — a web panel gives you everything you need to optimise and grow.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Can I try it for free first?
faq.a1: Yes! You get 14 days free access to all features. No credit card needed to start.
faq.a2: Yes, you can upgrade to Pro or downgrade at any time. The change takes effect immediately.
faq.a3: No, you pay monthly and can cancel at any time. No obligations.
faq.a4: We accept all common payment methods: Visa, Mastercard, Bancontact, iDEAL, and more via Stripe.
faq.a5: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade security, SSL encryption, and all data is stored in secure EU data centers in compliance with GDPR.

ordering.title: Fast handling, happy customers.
ordering.description: Process orders lightning fast during peak hours. No more queues. Everything perfectly integrated in the POS. Everything in real-time to the kitchen.

about.heroSubtitle: Built from practice. Not from an office.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Vysion was born from real experience. As entrepreneurs, we ran into the same problem as you: too many systems, too many costs and too little overview.
story.p2: We paid every month for separate tools: an ordering platform, accounting, payments and analytics — all separate, nothing that really worked together. The costs added up. So did the hassle.
story.p3: So we decided to do it differently. We built one smart platform, with the ordering platform at its heart, and everything you need alongside it simply included. No unnecessary features. No separate subscriptions. Just an honest system that works for entrepreneurs like you.

facts.foundedDesc: By entrepreneurs with more than 15 years of experience
facts.locationDesc: Pelt, Limburg - the heart of the Benelux
facts.countriesDesc: From Belgium to China, from Netherlands to the UK

mission.title: Our mission
mission.subtitle: Let entrepreneurs focus on what they do best: welcoming customers and creating great experiences. We take care of the rest.

personal.title: Personal

simplicity.title: 🎯 Simplicity above all
simplicity.description: Technology should help you, not get in the way. That's why Vysion is so intuitive you can get started within 5 minutes - no manual needed.

pricing.title: 💰 Fair pricing
pricing.description: No hidden costs, no long-term contracts, no surprises. What you see is what you pay.

improvement.title: 🚀 Continuous improvement
improvement.description: We listen to our customers and build what they need. New features are added every week, based on real feedback.

subscriptionsTermsPopup.body:
GENERAL TERMS AND CONDITIONS – POS SYSTEM & SOFTWARE (SUBSCRIPTION)
Supplier: Vysion Horeca

1. Definitions
- Supplier: Vysion Horeca
- Customer: the natural or legal person entering into a subscription
- Agreement: the subscription for POS software and related hardware
- Hardware: POS terminal, cash drawer and printer
- Subscription: monthly service of €99 (or current price)

2. Applicability
These general terms and conditions apply to all quotations, agreements and services provided by Vysion Horeca, unless otherwise agreed in writing.

3. Subscription and delivery
3.1. The Customer takes out a subscription for the use of the POS software.
3.2. Under a premium subscription, Hardware is made available without an initial purchase cost.
3.3. The Hardware remains the property of Vysion Horeca at all times, unless otherwise stated in article 13.

4. Ownership and use of hardware
4.1. The Customer only acquires a right of use of the Hardware.
4.2. The Customer is not permitted to:
- sell the Hardware
- rent it out
- pledge it
- transfer it to third parties
- or exploit it in any way outside own use
4.3. The Customer must handle the Hardware with reasonable care.

5. Duration and termination
5.1. The subscription is entered into for an indefinite period (or minimum duration if applicable).
5.2. Termination must be given in writing with one month's notice.
5.3. Upon termination of the subscription, the right to use both software and Hardware ceases immediately.
5.4. Hardware and software may be cancelled monthly without additional charges.

6. Return of hardware
6.1. Upon termination of the subscription, the Customer must return the Hardware to Vysion Horeca within 14 days.
6.2. If the Hardware is not returned:
- damages equal to the new purchase price of the Hardware will be charged
- Vysion Horeca reserves the right to claim additional costs
6.3. The Hardware must be returned in good condition (normal wear and tear excepted).

7. Loss, damage and liability
7.1. The Customer is fully liable for:
- loss
- theft
- damage
7.2. In these cases, the full replacement value will be charged.

8. Payment
8.1. The subscription fee is €99 per month (excl. VAT unless stated otherwise).
8.2. Invoices must be paid within 14 days.
8.3. In case of late payment:
- the service may be suspended
- access to the software may be blocked

9. Non-payment
9.1. In case of default, Vysion Horeca reserves the right to:
- terminate the subscription immediately
- reclaim the Hardware
9.2. All collection costs are borne by the Customer.

10. Use of software
10.1. The software may only be used for the Customer's business activities.
10.2. It is prohibited to:
- copy the software
- reverse engineer it
- or pass it on to third parties

11. Force majeure
Vysion Horeca is not liable for disruptions due to force majeure (such as internet issues, power outages, etc.).

12. Applicable law
Belgian law applies to this agreement.
Disputes fall under the competent court of Vysion Horeca's registered office.

13. Transfer of ownership after subscription period
13.1. The Hardware made available by Vysion Horeca remains the property of Vysion Horeca for the entire duration of the subscription.
13.2. If the Customer maintains the premium subscription for an uninterrupted period of 24 months and has paid all amounts due in full and on time, ownership of the Hardware is transferred free of charge to the Customer.
13.3. "Uninterrupted" means: no missed, late or partial payment and no suspension or termination of the subscription.
13.4. In case of:
- early termination
- default
- breach of contract
- or any interruption of the subscription
the right to transfer of ownership lapses automatically and the Hardware remains the property of Vysion Horeca.
13.5. In such cases, the Customer must return the Hardware immediately and within 14 days at the latest, as set out in article 6.
13.6. Subscription fees already paid are in no case deemed instalments towards purchase of the Hardware and confer no right of ownership.

14. Warranty and defects after transfer of ownership
14.1. From the moment the Hardware becomes the property of the Customer, all warranty and service obligations of Vysion Horeca cease.
14.2. The Customer accepts that from that moment:
- Vysion Horeca is not responsible for defects, wear or loss
- repair, maintenance or replacement is fully at the Customer's expense
14.3. Normal wear occurring after transfer of ownership is fully the responsibility of the Customer.
14.4. Vysion Horeca may optionally offer a maintenance or service contract after transfer of ownership, but this is not mandatory.

troubleshootingPage.subtitle: Common problems and solutions for your Vysion Horeca POS

1.question: My POS won't start
1.answer:
1. Check if the device is connected to power
  2. Hold the power button for 10 seconds to restart
  3. Check if all cables are properly connected
  4. Wait 2 minutes and try again
  5. If the problem persists, contact support

2.question: I can't log into my POS
2.answer:
1. Check if you're using the correct PIN
  2. Ask your administrator to reset your PIN
  3. Check if your account is not blocked (after 5 failed attempts)
  4. Contact support if you don't have access to an admin account

3.question: The payment terminal doesn't work
3.answer:
1. Check if the terminal is turned on (green light is on)
  2. Check the USB or Bluetooth connection
  3. Restart the terminal by turning it off and on
  4. Go to Settings → Payment Terminal → Reconnect
  5. Check if your internet connection is working

4.question: Receipt printer doesn't print
4.answer:
1. Check if there is paper in the printer
  2. Open and close the printer cover (this resets the printer)
  3. Check the USB/network connection
  4. Go to Settings → Printers → Test print
  5. If the test page doesn't print, restart the printer

5.question: My POS is slow
5.answer:
1. Close apps you're not using
  2. Check your internet connection (4G/WiFi)
  3. Restart the POS application
  4. Check if updates are available
  5. Contact support if the problem persists

6.question: Online orders aren't coming in
6.answer:
1. Check if your internet connection is working
  2. Check if the online ordering module is enabled
  3. Go to Settings → Online Ordering → Sync
  4. Check if your location is "open" in the system
  5. Check your opening hours in settings

7.question: I want to add or edit a product
7.answer:
1. Go to the menu top left → Products
  2. Click "New product" or select an existing product
  3. Fill in the name, price and category
  4. Click "Save"
  5. The product is now available on your POS

8.question: How do I make a Z-report / day closing?
8.answer:
1. Go to the menu top left → Reports
  2. Select "Z-Report" or "Day Closing"
  3. Check the details
  4. Click "Close and print"
  5. The report is printed and the day is closed

9.question: I forgot my password
9.answer:
1. Go to the login page
  2. Click "Forgot password"
  3. Enter your email address
  4. You will receive a link to reset your password
  5. Or contact support: +32 492 12 93 83

10.question: The app keeps crashing
10.answer:
1. Close the app completely
  2. Restart your device
  3. Check if you have the latest version of the app
  4. Remove and reinstall the app (your data is preserved)
  5. Contact support if the problem persists

helpPage.heroSubtitle: Find answers to your questions here.

supportPage.heroSubtitle: Our support team is available 7 days a week. We usually respond within 5 minutes.
supportPage.phoneDesc: Direct contact with a team member
supportPage.faqSubtitle: Quickly find answers to the most common questions
supportPage.hoursDesc: We are here when you need us. Even on weekends and public holidays.
supportPage.ctaDesc: Try Vysion Horeca free for 14 days. No credit card needed, get started right away.
supportPage.faq1Q: How can I adjust my menu?
supportPage.faq1A: Log in to your dashboard and go to Products. You can add, edit or delete products. Changes are immediately visible in your ordering platform.
supportPage.faq2Q: How does payment terminal integration work?
supportPage.faq2A: Vysion Horeca supports Bancontact, Visa, Mastercard via Mollie and Stripe. Go to Settings > Payments to connect your payment provider.
supportPage.faq3Q: Can I change my opening hours?
supportPage.faq3A: Yes, go to Settings > Opening hours. You can set different times per day and also add vacation days or closing days.
supportPage.faq4Q: How do I add a new employee?
supportPage.faq4A: Go to Staff in your dashboard. Click Add employee and fill in the details. You can also assign roles and permissions.
supportPage.faq5Q: My printer is not working, what should I do?
supportPage.faq5A: Check that the printer is on and connected to the same network. Go to Settings > Printers and click Test print. Contact us if the problem persists.
supportPage.faq6Q: How can I change or cancel my subscription?
supportPage.faq6A: Go to Settings > Subscription. You can upgrade to Pro or cancel your subscription monthly. There are no cancellation fees.
supportPage.faq7A: Yes, all your data is encrypted and stored on secure servers within the EU. We comply with all GDPR requirements.
supportPage.faq8Q: Can I use the app on multiple devices?
supportPage.faq8A: Yes, you can log in on unlimited devices. Your dashboard synchronizes automatically between all devices.
supportPage.faq9A: Vysion owns the hardware—the POS, printer and cash drawer. If you are a Premium customer for 24 consecutive months, you automatically become the owner of the hardware after 24 months with no additional payment.

resellersPage.heroDesc: Sell Vysion Horeca in your country or region. Earn commission on every client you bring in. We deliver the software, you deliver the clients.
resellersPage.benefit1Desc: Receive monthly commission on every active client. Passive income that grows.
resellersPage.benefit2Desc: The software works directly in NL, EN, FR, DE, ES, IT, JA, ZH and AR. Ready for your market.
resellersPage.benefit3Desc: Unique feature no competitor has. Easy to sell to hospitality businesses.
resellersPage.benefit4Desc: View your clients, commissions and statistics in real-time.
resellersPage.benefit5Desc: You sell, we take care of hosting, updates and technical support.
resellersPage.benefit6Desc: Hospitality is digitalizing fast. QR ordering and online ordering are the future.

resellersPage.faq1A: Nothing! There are no costs to become a partner. You only earn commission on the clients you bring in.
resellersPage.faq2Q: When do I receive my commission?
resellersPage.faq2A: Commissions are calculated monthly and paid around the 15th of the month for the previous month.
resellersPage.faq3A: No, we handle all the technology. You just need to sell and we will help you with training and materials.
resellersPage.faq4Q: Can I become a reseller in any country?
resellersPage.faq4A: Yes! The software supports 9 languages and works worldwide. We are looking for partners in all countries.
